nasb.text: The bulrushes by the Nile, by the edge of the Nile And all the sown fields by the Nile Will become dry, be driven away, and be no more.

esv.text: There will be bare places by the Nile, on the brink of the Nile, and all that is sown by the Nile will be parched, will be driven away, and will be no more.

cnv.text: 尼羅河旁、尼羅河口的草田， 以及沿著尼羅河所種的田都必枯乾， 被吹散，不再存在。

ccb.text: 尼罗河两岸青草枯黄， 田地龟裂，庄稼被风吹去， 荡然无存。

csbs.text: 尼罗河边、尼罗河口的蒲草， 以及沿着尼罗河所种的田都必枯竭， 被风吹去，不复存在。
